title: LIVIVO 1L Cordless 900W Kettle Compact for Travel, Guest Room, Office Makes 4 Cups of tea & coffee - Boil Protection & Auto Shut off [Energy Class A+] (White)
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: LIVIVO 1L KETTLE The compact 1Ltr/1.75 pint capacity is just 18cm high and makes 4 cups of tea, coffee, infusions or hot chocolate
CLEAR WINDOW A handy water level indicator window ensures you get just the right amount of water, saving time and energy

LED PILOT LAMP A bright red pilot lamp provides a visual indication of whether the kettle is on or off, allowing the user to judge this from a distance and is particularly useful for deaf or hard of hearing users
SAFETY FEATURES An automatic safety cut off ensures the kettle does not reach unsafe temperatures, while a sensor ensures the kettle needs to be filled and cannot boil dry
SPECIFICATIONS 900W power, UK plug, detachable pouring jug and energy efficient element. The smaller form factor is ideal for travel, caravans or as a second kettle for the bed, office etc.
description: Product Description LIVIVO 1L Kettle - White Whether you want a cuppa on the move or you want to free up some counter space in your home, the LIVIVO 1l kettle could be the solution for you. Because of its compact design, this kettle can be easily stored in cupboards or kept on worktops. It takes up little space, making it ideal for people with smaller kitchens. If you're on the go in a group of two or on your own, this compact lightweight 660g caravan kettle could be the perfect companion. Its 1-litre capacity makes it ideal for boiling water for a couple or small family. Safe 1000W power with overheat and boil dry safety cut-off. Clear Transparent water level gauge to prevent over-filling. Effortless Simple one switch on/off with an indicator light.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Automatic Shut-Off, Heat Resistant Handle, Illuminated Water Window, Push Button Lid
